root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, count( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) as c_count, sum( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ) as c_balance
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code, sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance <> 0 ) ) GROUP BY sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description /*WHERE*/
